hooks.command:
node -e "const i=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}');const f=i.file_path||'';if(!f.match(/\.tsx?$/) || !f.includes('marketing_atps'))process.exit(0);const fs=require('fs');const src=fs.existsSync(f)?fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'):'';const issues=[];if(src.match(/style=\{\{/))issues.push('ANTI-PATTERN: inline style={{}} detected — use Tailwind utilities or CSS variables');if(src.match(/console\.(log|warn|error)\(/))issues.push('WARNING: console.log/warn/error left in code');if(src.match(/: any[^[]/) && !f.includes('.d.ts'))issues.push('WARNING: TypeScript any type detected — use proper types');if(issues.length){console.error('
⚠️  MyATPS Marketing Guard:
'+issues.join('
')+'
')}" 2>&1; exit 0
